title: Open an Editor
text: Open an Editor You can open editors of components, IncludeScript and snippets from the Project. You can open editors for global objects from the menu. For more information, see Open a Main Development Object for Editing . Each main development object is opened in its own editor, which is displayed as a tab of a Uniface IDE window. The Uniface IDE allows you to have 2 windows open, each of which can contain multiple editors. For more information, see Open or Close the Secondary IDE Window . If you have not created any objects yet, create a project, then create other objects in the project. For more information, see Create a Project and Create a New Development Object .
